hooks.command: sh -c '[ -f .claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh claude-code user-prompt-submit || bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" claude-code user-prompt-submit'
sh -c '[ -f .claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh claude-code pre-tool-use || bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" claude-code pre-tool-use'
sh -c '[ -f .claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh claude-code post-tool-use || bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" claude-code post-tool-use'
sh -c '[ -f .claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh claude-code stop || bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" claude-code stop'
